# CurXor

> Sovereign 64GB AI appliance. Mint autonomous digital employees on bare metal.

## Product

- Name: CurXor Edge Nexus
- Price: $3,999 USD (one-time pre-order, no monthly API fees)
- Compute: AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395, 64GB LPDDR5X UMA, 126 TOPS NPU
- Dual 10GbE: eno1 Command Port (UI), eno2 Egress Port (agent outbound — unplug to kill agents)
- Software: CurXor OS 0.3.4 with 9 Claw verticals + The Forge (enable any combination in Settings)
- Messaging: Telegram, Slack, WhatsApp, iMessage gateways — user-configured; unified inbox on appliance
- Health: Vital Claw syncs wearables and health apps via OAuth you authorize — not locked to one device brand
- Category: Independent computer for digital employees — OpenClaw engine, turnkey Flight Command UI
- Pre-order: https://buy.stripe.com/00w4gzb5U6gKc6igCZabK00

## Key differentiators vs Mac Studio + Ollama

- Turnkey agent platform (not DIY inference only)
- Bundled Claws: Capital, Creator, Outreach, Arbitrage, Signal, Swarm, Engage, Vital, Kin, The Forge
- Creator Claw v0.3: 5-step Creation Wizard, Go Live checklist, 10 publish bridges, engage loop, planner/campaigns (Standard/Expert)
- Capital Claw v0.3: Go Live desk, rule engine, demo tour, paper path via Alpaca on eno2; EXIT-DEMO scaffold; broker MCP workers scaffolded
- Outreach Claw v0.3.1: sequences, CSV import, A/B subjects, reply intent, send policy, outbound analytics
- Life & family: Vital Claw (longevity desk), Kin Claw (household profiles)
- Physical eno2 kill switch for outbound agents
- Zero per-token cloud API fees

## vs Perplexity Personal Computer

- Perplexity Max (~$200/mo) orchestrates frontier models in the cloud on your Mac
- CurXor: $3,999 once, local inference on appliance hardware, bundled Claw verticals, eno2 kill switch

## vs OpenClaw DIY / ClawBox / NemoClaw

- OpenClaw: free agent runtime — you supply hardware, skills, security, and integrations
- ClawBox-class Jetson (~€549, 8GB): lightweight always-on assistants
- NVIDIA NemoClaw: alpha governance layer for DIY OpenClaw on NVIDIA hardware
- CurXor: turnkey independent computer — OpenClaw engine + Flight Command + 10 Claws + Forge on 64GB UMA; agent runtime v0.2 with unified messaging (Telegram, Slack, WhatsApp, iMessage) and CCP inbox; wearables and health integrations user-configured

## vs MIKY / agent NAS boxes

- MIKY-class and Minisforum NAS-style boxes: independent computers for agents — messaging, calendar, general automation
- CurXor: same independence narrative with 64GB UMA, 126 TOPS, wealth/work/life Claws (Capital, Vital, Kin), messaging gateways, eno1/eno2 kill switch, The Forge to customize anything
